notes: acme/local-lib 1.0.0 is resolved from a Composer artifact-type repository (a local directory of ZIP archives). The lockfile dist.type is 'zip' and dist.url is a local relative path. Mend must report source type 'url' (not 'registry' and not 'local') and record the artifact path in source_detail.

acme/local-lib.note: Composer artifact repositories produce a lockfile entry with dist.type=zip and a local path URL. Mend should classify this as 'url' source, not 'registry' (Packagist) or 'local' (path-type repository).

failure_modes_exercised: source reported as 'registry' instead of 'url' for artifact-sourced package
package entirely missing — Mend skips artifact repository packages
source reported as 'local' (path-repository confusion) instead of 'url'
dist.url / artifact path lost from output
